conditional: Public utility buildings, structures and equipment

zones.source_citation: Art. V, Sec. 501 (Lot area/dimensions and Setbacks tables)
zones.notes: Min lot area for single-family dwelling = 1 acre (43,560 sf); other permitted uses determined by building area/parking/setbacks. Min lot width 150 ft, min lot depth 150 ft. Density: no more than one single-family dwelling per lot. Setbacks for single-family: front 35 ft, interior side 10 ft, corner side 20 ft, rear 20 ft. Schools/civic/cultural/religious and all commercial agricultural uses = 50 ft all yards. Max height 28 ft (conditional use may be granted for agricultural buildings). Setbacks tables on PDF p.38; lot area on PDF p.38.

zones.source_citation: Art. V, Sec. 502 (Lot area/dimensions and Setbacks tables)
zones.notes: Min lot area 7,000 sf for single-family dwelling; may average across a subdivision provided no lot < 6,600 sf and not more than 10% of lots < 7,000 sf. Min lot width 70 ft, min lot depth 100 ft. Side setback for single-family: no side less than 5 ft, at least one side yard 10 ft (recorded 5 ft as the minimum). Front 20 ft, corner side 20 ft, rear 20 ft. Max height 30 ft. Density: no more than one single-family dwelling per lot.

zones.source_citation: Art. V, Sec. 503 (Lot area/dimensions and Setbacks tables)
zones.notes: Min lot area 5,000 sf for single-family; duplexes 5,000 sf per dwelling unit. Min lot width 50 ft, min lot depth 100 ft (both single-family and duplex). Density: no more than two dwelling units per lot. Setbacks (single-family and duplex): front 20 ft, interior side 10 ft (at least one side yard 10 ft; other may be less per separation rules), corner side 20 ft, rear 20 ft. Max height 28 ft. Zero lot line development may be permitted.

permitted: Townhouse cluster (not to exceed four units or 120 feet in length)

zones.source_citation: Art. V, Sec. 504 (Lot area/dimensions and Setbacks tables)
zones.notes: Lot area is per-unit basis. min_lot_size_sf recorded as the single-family minimum of 5,000 sf (width 45 ft, depth 90 ft, 600 sf outdoor living/unit). Other per-structure minimums: two-family 3,000 sf (width 70, 600 sf/unit); three-family 3,000 sf (width 80, 500 sf/unit); four-family 3,000 sf (width 80, 400 sf/unit); townhouse cluster 3,000 sf (width 90, 400 sf/unit). min_lot_width_ft recorded as smallest (45 ft, single-family). Setbacks: front 20 ft; single-family interior side 5 ft (at least one side 10 ft); two/three/four-family and townhouse interior side 10 ft; corner side 20 ft; rear 20 ft. Max height 30 ft. Setbacks table on PDF p.51.

permitted: Townhouse cluster (not to exceed four units or 120 feet)
Townhouse cluster with four or more units (not to exceed 160 feet)

zones.source_citation: Art. V, Sec. 505 (Lot area/dimensions and Setbacks tables)
zones.notes: Lot area is per-unit basis. Min area per unit 2,000 sf for both multi-family structure and townhouse cluster; min lot dimensions width 90 ft, depth 90 ft. Outdoor living area 300 sf/unit (multi-family) or 400 sf/unit (townhouse). min_lot_size_sf recorded as 2,000 sf (per dwelling unit). Setbacks: front 20 ft; interior side 10 ft (table shows 10'/15'); corner side 20 ft; rear 20 ft. side_setback_ft recorded as 10 (lower bound). Max height 35 ft. Setbacks table on PDF p.56.

zones.source_citation: Art. V, Sec. 506 (Lot area/dimensions and Setbacks tables)
zones.notes: No R-5 zone may be established unless site contains at least 10 acres. Min lot area by use: manufactured home to 16' width 4,400 sf (recorded as min_lot_size_sf); manufactured home over 16' width 5,000 sf; single-family dwelling 5,000 sf; recreational vehicle space 3,500 sf (RV spaces capped at 10% of total). Min lot width: 40 ft (manufactured to 16'), 50 ft (over 16' / single-family). Setbacks (manufactured/single-family): front 10 ft, interior side 5 ft, corner side 10 ft, rear 10 ft. Max height 30 ft.

zones.source_citation: Art. V, Sec. 507 (Lot area/dimensions and Setbacks)
zones.notes: No R-6 zone may be established unless site contains at least 10 acres. Each RV/park model space min 2,000 sf with min lot width 40 ft. Setbacks are described as spacing rules, not front/interior/corner/rear yards: min 5 ft setback from nearest edge of any interior street/roadway and min 5 ft from space boundary; 20 ft on entry side where space borders two or more interior streets. Min distance between RVs/park models 10 ft. side_setback_ft recorded as 5 ft (the general space-boundary minimum); front/rear and max height not specified for this zone -> TBD.

permitted: Bakeries for on-site sales (less than 3,500 sf)
Banks and other savings and lending institutions
Convenience food stores (not more than 3,500 sf)
Essential public service or utility installations
Restaurants (not more than 3,500 sf, excluding convenience food restaurants)
conditional: Convenience-food stores with not more than four gas pumps
Shoe repair and shoe shine shop

zones.source_citation: Art. VI, Sec. 601.G (Setbacks, yards and heights table)
zones.notes: Building setbacks: front 20 ft, interior side and rear 15 ft, corner side 20 ft, residential zone boundary 45 ft. Parking lot setbacks: front 10 ft, interior side/rear 3 ft, corner side 10 ft. Max height 30 ft. No minimum lot size or width specified for C-1 -> TBD.

zones.source_citation: Art. VI, Sec. 602.G-H (Setbacks/heights and Lot width/area)
zones.notes: Building setbacks: front 20 ft, interior side and rear 15 ft, corner side 20 ft, residential zone boundary 45 ft. Parking lot setbacks: front 10 ft, interior side/rear 3 ft, corner side 10 ft. Max height 35 ft. Min lot width 100 ft (corner lots 150 ft). Min lot area determined by building area/parking/setbacks -> not numeric -> TBD. Use list extensive (PDF pp.72-78); not enumerated here. Lot width/area on PDF p.80.

zones.source_citation: Art. VI, Sec. 603 (Setbacks table and Lot width/area)
zones.notes: Building setbacks: front 35 ft, interior side and rear 15 ft, corner side 25 ft, residential zone boundary 45 ft. Parking lot setbacks: front 4 ft, interior side/rear 3 ft, corner side 4 ft. Max height: structure may exceed 45 ft provided buildings over 35 ft are subject to additional fire protection (recorded 45 ft as the threshold stated). Min lot width 100 ft (corner lots 150 ft). Min lot area determined by building area/parking/setbacks -> TBD.

permitted: Professional, semi-professional, administrative and business offices
Medical, dental and chiropractic offices (not including hospitals or medical facilities)
Studios for photography, commercial arts, or other professional work

zones.source_citation: Art. VI, Sec. 604.F-G (Lot development standards and Lot width/area)
zones.notes: Building setbacks: front 35 ft, interior side and rear 15 ft, corner side 20 ft, residential zone boundary 45 ft. Parking lot setbacks: front 4 ft, interior side/rear 3 ft, corner side 4 ft. Max height 30 ft. Min lot width: code text reads 'one hundred (150) feet' (spelled word and parenthetical conflict); parenthetical numeral 150 recorded, corner lots 200 ft. Min lot area determined by building area/parking/retention/landscaping/setbacks -> TBD.

zones.source_citation: Art. VI, Sec. 605.G-H (Setbacks/height and Lot width/area)
zones.notes: Building setbacks: front 35 ft, rear 15 ft, interior side aggregate of 15 ft (both side yards added must total 15 ft), corner side 25 ft, residential zone boundary 45 ft. side_setback_ft recorded as 15 (aggregate of both sides). Parking lot setbacks: front 4 ft, interior side/rear 3 ft, corner side 4 ft. Max height 35 ft. Min lot width: code text 'one hundred (150) feet' (conflict); parenthetical numeral 150 recorded, corner lots 200 ft. Min lot area determined by building area/parking/retention/landscaping/setbacks -> TBD. Use list extensive (PDF pp.93-98); not enumerated here. Lot width/area on PDF p.100.

zones.source_citation: Art. VII, Sec. 701.G-H (Setbacks/heights and Lot width/area)
zones.notes: Garden and Light Industrial. Building setbacks: front 35 ft, interior side and rear 15 ft, corner side 30 ft, residential zone boundary 45 ft. Parking lot setbacks: front 4 ft, interior side/rear 3 ft, corner side 4 ft. Max height 35 ft. Min lot width 100 ft. Min lot area determined by building area/parking/setbacks -> TBD. Use list extensive (PDF pp.101-104); not enumerated here.

zones.source_citation: Art. VII, Sec. 702.G-H (Setbacks/heights and Lot width/area)
zones.notes: Permits all uses allowed in I-1 plus additional. Building setbacks: front 35 ft, interior side and rear 15 ft, corner side 30 ft, residential zone boundary 75 ft. Parking lot setbacks: front 4 ft, interior side/rear 3 ft, corner side 4 ft. Max height 55 ft (buildings over 35 ft require City approval and additional fire protection). Min lot width 100 ft. Min lot area determined by building area/parking/setbacks -> TBD. Use list extensive (PDF pp.105-109); not enumerated here.

conditional: Hazardous materials storage, hauling or manufacturing

zones.source_citation: Art. VII, Sec. 703.E-F (Setbacks/heights and Lot width/area)
zones.notes: Also referred to as Mining-Industrial / Heavy Industrial in Sec. 401 list; section header is 'Mining Industrial Zone (I-3)'. Building setbacks: front 35 ft, interior side and rear 15 ft, corner side 30 ft, residential zone boundary 45 ft. Parking lot setbacks: front 4 ft, interior side/rear 3 ft, corner side 4 ft. Max height 55 ft (buildings over 35 ft require City approval and additional fire protection). Min lot area = 30 acres (1,306,800 sf). Min lot width determined by use/buildings/access -> TBD. Land reclamation plan required.

Flexible/negotiated zone with no fixed dimensional standards in the code; standards are established per approved PAD plan and governed by the City of Coolidge Design Guidelines (adopted by reference). May include residential, commercial, and industrial uses on a single or contiguous parcels under unified control. All dimensional standards -> TBD (set by individual PAD approval).

zones.zone_name: Regional Mixed-Use Planned Area Development Zone (RMU-PAD)
zones.source_citation: Art. VIII, Sec. 802 (Regional Mixed-Use Planned Area Development)
zones.notes: Mixed-use PAD requiring more than 200 acres, located outside the traditional central business district. May include all uses permitted in R-2, R-3, R-4, C-1, C-2, C-3 and PAD, plus government/quasi-government uses. Flexible/negotiated zone with no fixed dimensional standards in the code; standards set per approved development plan. All dimensional standards -> TBD. Overall purpose matches Sec. 801.A.
